message:
fix(tests): add pre-test cleanup for orphaned test-beads

Add cleanup logic in beforeAll hook to remove any test-beads that
weren't properly cleaned up from prior interrupted test runs.

- Lists open issues with "test-bead-" prefix
- Bulk closes them with force flag
- Logs cleanup actions for debugging
- Non-fatal: continues even if cleanup fails

Also cleaned up 15 orphaned test-beads from interrupted runs.

Closes bd-14iyf

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
